cast.name: Guy Veryzer
cast.character: Maitre d' of Essex House Resturant

plot outline: It's 1955. Frank and April Wheeler, are in the 'seven year itch' of their marriage; they're not happy. April has forgone her dream of being an actress, and Frank hates his job. One day, April suggests they move to Paris as a means to rejuvenate their life.
title: Revolutionary Road

other companies.name: The Newman Scoring Stage, Twentieth Century Fox Studios
